ddls:
CREATE TABLE "clothing_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clothing item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing item */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the clothing item */,
  "style" TEXT /* Style of the clothing item */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the clothing item */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season the clothing item belongs to */,
  "launch_date" TEXT /* Date the clothing item was launched */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the clothing item (e.g., tops, bottoms, dresses) */,
  "sub_category" TEXT /* Sub-category of the clothing item (e.g., t-shirts, jeans, formal dresses) */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the clothing item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size (e.g., S, M, L, XL, XXL) */,
  "chest_measurement" TEXT /* Measurement of the chest for this size */,
  "across_shoulder_measurement" TEXT /* Measurement of the across shoulder for this size */,
  "body_length_measurement" TEXT /* Measurement of the body length for this size */,
  "sleeve_length_measurement" TEXT /* Measurement of the sleeve length for this size */,
  "waist_measurement" TEXT /* Measurement of the waist for this size */,
  "hip_measurement" TEXT /* Measurement of the hip for this size */,
  "size_type" TEXT /* Type of size (e.g., Regular, Petite, Tall) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warehouses" (
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warehouse */,
  "warehouse_name" TEXT /* Name of the warehouse */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the warehouse */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the warehouse */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the warehouse */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the warehouse */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing item */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item in stock */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the item */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity to reorder when the item reaches the reorder level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address of the customer */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., Pending, Shipped, Delivered) */,
  "total_amount" TEXT /* Total amount of the order */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the order (e.g., Credit Card, PayPal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing item */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item ordered */,
  "unit_price" TEXT /* Unit price of the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing item */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size */,
  "quantity_sold" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date the sale occurred */,
  "revenue" TEXT /* Revenue generated from the sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_specifications" (
  "spec_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product specification */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing item */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size */,
  "fabric" TEXT /* Fabric used for the clothing item */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the clothing item */,
  "care_instructions" TEXT /* Care instructions for the clothing item */,
  "material_composition" TEXT /* Material composition of the clothing item */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the clothing item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spec_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_specifications_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_specifications_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "discounts" (
  "discount_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each discount */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "discount_type" TEXT /* Type of discount (e.g., percentage, fixed amount) */,
  "discount_amount" TEXT /* Amount of the discount */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("discount_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_discounts_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)
